meta.name: Soul Food Black-Eyed Peas with Okra
meta.author: SSA Canonical Catalog

source.notes: Canonical SSA soul food baseline. Black-eyed peas simmered with smoky meat and tender okra, finished with vinegar and heat.

meta.summary: Tender black-eyed peas simmered with smoky meat, onion, garlic, and sliced okra for body and flavor—finished with tangy vinegar and hot sauce.

notes: If using pork or turkey, simmer until fully heated and peas are tender.
Cool leftovers quickly and refrigerate within 2 hours.

ingredients.label: Smoked meat (ham hock, smoked turkey wing/leg, or neck bones)

steps.title: Sort and rinse peas
steps.body: Pick through dried peas to remove debris. Rinse under cold water until mostly clear. Drain.

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.body: Heat oil or bacon fat in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and celery and cook 6–8 minutes until softened. Add garlic and cook 30–60 seconds until fragrant.

steps.title: Add peas, meat, and liquid
steps.body: Add rinsed peas, smoked meat, broth, bay leaf, black pepper, and optional smoked paprika or cayenne. Stir and bring to a gentle simmer.

steps.title: Simmer peas until nearly tender
steps.body: Reduce heat to low and simmer partially covered for 45–60 minutes, stirring occasionally, until peas are mostly tender.

steps.title: Add okra
steps.body: Stir in sliced okra and continue simmering 15–25 minutes until okra is tender and the broth has slightly thickened.

steps.title: Shred meat (optional)
steps.body: Remove smoked meat, let cool briefly, pull meat from bones, and return meat to the pot. Discard bones and skin as desired.

steps.title: Season and finish
steps.body: Remove bay leaf. Taste and add salt as needed. Stir in apple cider vinegar and hot sauce if using. Simmer 2–3 minutes, then serve hot.
